description.value:
Style note
Founded by Maurice Rance in 1971, Recherche Nature Cosmetique (rnc) brings you Eau De Plaisir fragrance, which has over 60% natural ingredients in its formulas. The glass flask references the ornaments of the gates of the Louvre, Paris, and is crafted by a renowned glassmaker in Milan the shape of the bottle (designed by Rance) has been retained since the day of its inception.

Product Details
Eau Fraiche from Eau De Plaisir is an Eaux De Cologne - the result of mixing high end essential oils with techniques handed down from centuries. Eau Fraiche has a fragrance with an accord of citrus fruits with base notes of oriental woods, which provides freshness and well-being. The top notes are lemon, orange and bitter orange that blend into heart notes of geranium, sage and galbanum. The dry down has base notes of ambergris, sandalwood and opopanax.

Caution
Flammable
Keep away from sources of ignition
Keep away from children
Do not use near fire, flame or heat
Avoid spraying near the eyes

Size
125 ml
